stories.headline: Senate Votes to Direct End to Iran War, Rebuking Trump on War Powers
stories.summary: A few Republicans joined Democrats in favor of a measure instructing President Trump to halt military operations against Iran or seek congressional authorization.

stories.headline: Bitcoin’s Retreating Retail Army Exposes Fresh Market Fragility
stories.summary: Bitcoin spent years trying to shed its reputation as a playground for speculative retail traders. Its latest selloff is exposing the tradeoff: Wall Street brought scale and legitimacy, but the retail buyers who once helped absorb sharp declines have largely vanished.

Equity markets steadied after a brief selloff in top-performing technology names, with Micron’s earnings taking on added significance as a test for the rally in artificial intelligence stocks. Micron’s earnings report on Wednesday afternoon is shaping up to be one of the most important in months as investors find themselves suddenly on edge over the sustainability of the AI rally.
